FAQ.title: Frequently Asked Questions
FAQ.description: Check out common questions about collaboration and services.
FAQ.q1: What technical stack do you mainly use?
FAQ.a1: I primarily use Next.js + TypeScript + Node.js fullstack, and actively leverage AWS infrastructure and AI tools like Claude/Gemini.
FAQ.q2: What areas do you cover in freelance projects?
FAQ.a2: I handle web application development, backend API design, AWS infra setup, AI integration, and refactoring. Worked with clients like Wise Express, The Varai, and CPR Learning.
FAQ.a3: Please reach out via email or LinkedIn. I respond within 24 hours.
FAQ.q4: Are you currently looking for a job?
FAQ.a4: While working at The Robot Coding, I am open to exploring Full-stack or AI-related positions.
FAQ.q5: Which AI tools do you use?
FAQ.a5: I use Claude Code for code reviews and architecture, and Gemini CLI for automation workflows.

core.title: FullStack Expertise

chrome.title: Tamago Bot
chrome.desc: A Chrome extension where you complete tasks with a digital pet. Managing dynamic UI states with React, a product actually deployed to the Chrome Web Store.

mindtap.title: MindTap Vision Pro
mindtap.desc: An app that streams Brain-Computer Interface (BCI) data in real-time to Apple Vision Pro. A multi-platform system combining Python data pipelines and Firebase synchronization.
